summary: Added 3 comprehensive E2E tests for transfer tabs iteration 2: [XFER-OUTGOING-3] tests full end-to-end cancel functionality including equipment status revert verification, [XFER-OUTGOING-4] verifies permission checks ensuring only the sender can cancel their outgoing transfers while recipients cannot, and [XFER-OUTGOING-5] validates that approved or rejected transfers cannot be cancelled and only pending transfers show cancel buttons. These tests address the gaps identified in iteration 1 by providing comprehensive coverage of cancel functionality, permission boundaries, and status validation rules.
